subject: [COMMON][POSTGRES] Make DB init jobs ServiceMesh compatible
commit_message:
[COMMON][POSTGRES] Make DB init jobs ServiceMesh compatible

Add wait cycles and sidecar deletion container to ETCD and POSTGRES
init charts

Issue-ID: OOM-2820

Signed-off-by: Andreas Geissler <andreas-geissler@telekom.de>
Change-Id: Iddc8b7d161dddafe53efb0ce809542a60bd957b8

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5307/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/5307/ )
